creator: wen@FreeBSD.org
text:
Sorry for the breakage.

I would like update py-markdown to 3.4.1 , then llvm13 build.

I send the patch to maintainer of py-markdown.

The patch is simle:

--- a/textproc/py-markdown/Makefile
+++ b/textproc/py-markdown/Makefile
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 PORTNAME=      markdown
-PORTVERSION=   3.3.7
+PORTVERSION=   3.4.1
 CATEGORIES=    textproc python
 MASTER_SITES=  CHEESESHOP
 PKGNAMEPREFIX= ${PYTHON_PKGNAMEPREFIX}
diff --git a/textproc/py-markdown/distinfo b/textproc/py-markdown/distinfo
index 8b4bc402b24c..7ab4e6529290 100644
--- a/textproc/py-markdown/distinfo
+++ b/textproc/py-markdown/distinfo
@@ -1,3 +1,3 @@
-TIMESTAMP = 1652122699
-SHA256 (Markdown-3.3.7.tar.gz) = cbb516f16218e643d8e0a95b309f77eb118cb138d39a4f27851e6a63581db874
-SIZE (Markdown-3.3.7.tar.gz) = 324130
+TIMESTAMP = 1660473317
+SHA256 (Markdown-3.4.1.tar.gz) = 3b809086bb6efad416156e00a0da66fe47618a5d6918dd688f53f40c8e4cfeff
+SIZE (Markdown-3.4.1.tar.gz) = 322554
